title: Fails to parse `initial if (0) $error`
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`./yosys system.v` on a91ea661; regression from f01a61f (before PR #1077)

```
module top;
initial
   if (0) $error("ASDF");
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

No parser error, as on f01a61f.

## Actual behavior

```
-- Parsing `system.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: system.v
Parsing Verilog input from `system.v' to AST representation.
system.v:3: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected TOK_ELAB_TASK
```
